summary: Energetic first set highlighted by Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstance, Terrapin Station and a superb Other One; recording is decent though not specifically described.
review: Both reviewers rave about the show’s high‑octane first set – Lost Sailor into Saint of Circumstance drives nonstop, Terrapin Station feels like its Binghampton incarnation, and The Other One stands out as one of the best on the archive. No technical complaints are noted, suggesting a listenable (likely audience) source with satisfactory sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are very positive (4‑ and 5‑star) and praise multiple songs; no recording issues are mentioned, indicating a solid performance and acceptable audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity or mix, implying no major problems were perceived.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as packed with nonstop energy and consistent strength; overall pacing praised.
